offer: For logistics coordinators processing 10–20 shipments/week, inefficient carrier assignments cause increased shipping costs. We recommend carrier assignments based on data analysis instead of manual carrier selection based on past experiences.
problem: Inefficient carrier assignments leading to increased shipping costs and delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics coordinators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on logistics tools
DM outreach to logistics coordinators with demo videos
Participate in community forums for logistics discussions
try_it: Let users try data input for shipment details and carrier performance tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing shipment data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
